name: 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP
about: 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP is a medication used to treat idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), a type of lung disease that causes scarring and thickening of lung tissues. These tablets are available in a convenient dosage form and have a normal fermentation smell. Each tablet contains 200 mg of pirfenidone, the active ingredient that helps reduce inflammation and fibrosis in the lungs. These tablets have a shelf life of 12-24 months and should be stored in a dry place. These tablets are manufactured in India and are available for export, supply, and trade.

faq.q: What is 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP used for?
faq.a: These tablets are used to treat idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis (IPF), a type of lung disease that causes scarring and thickening of lung tissues.

faq.q: How many tablets are included in each package?
faq.a: The number of tablets in each package may vary depending on the supplier.

faq.q: Are there any side effects to taking 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP?
faq.a: Common side effects may include nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, and loss of appetite. Consult with your doctor for a full list of potential side effects.

faq.q: How long does it take for 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP to start working?
faq.a: The time for the medication to start working may vary depending on the individual and the severity of the condition. Consult with your doctor for more information.

faq.q: Can 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP be taken with other medications?
faq.a: It is important to consult with your doctor before taking any new medications, including 200 MG Pirfenidone Tablets IP, to avoid potential interactions.
